description_long: This house features a rectangular layout with a red gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by a low boundary wall. The front yard includes a paved driveway with a carport shaded by large umbrellas, and a landscaped garden area with shrubs and trees. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio with outdoor seating, a small pool, and additional greenery, creating a private recreational space. Large windows and glass doors line the back facade, allowing ample natural light into the main living areas. A small balcony and a rooftop lookout structure add vertical interest and provide elevated views. The overall design blends Mediterranean and contemporary elements, with clean lines, terracotta roofing, and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A white-walled house with a red gable roof, landscaped gardens, a shaded carport, and a spacious rear patio with a pool and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red gable roof, white walls, carport with umbrellas, and a landscaped garden along the boundary.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large patio, pool, outdoor seating, and extensive windows and doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the garden area, boundary wall, and the rooftop lookout structure.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entry, carport with umbrellas, and a small landscaped area near the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass doors and windows at the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple door with a small overhang, adjacent to a paved driveway and shaded carport with umbrellas.
